name: Contact Form Grid
description: Two-column contact section: left column shows quick-contact cards (WhatsApp, email, address-with-map, phone) plus social icons; right column hosts the contact form rendered by the forms extension. The form itself (fields, labels, validation, success state) is owned by the forms extension and configured via the 'contact' form slug — only the framing copy lives in this block.

field_schema.label: Contact cards
field_schema.help: Quick-contact tiles shown in the left column. The 'pin' card additionally renders a map placeholder and an hours line; other icons render as a single line of label + value.

sub_fields.label: Icon
sub_fields.help: Pick the icon. 'pin' triggers the address-with-map variant; everything else is a compact single-line card.

sub_fields.label: Primary value
sub_fields.help: The phone number, email, or street address shown in display font.

sub_fields.label: Hours line (HTML allowed, only used by the 'pin' card)
sub_fields.help: Optional opening-hours line rendered under the map on the address card. Leave empty for non-address cards.

field_schema.label: Form heading
field_schema.help: The title displayed above the contact form (e.g. 'Drop us a line.').

field_schema.label: Form subheading
field_schema.help: Small text shown below the form title (e.g. 'We reply in the order we receive').

test_data.form_subheading: We reply in the order we receive.
